name: AnatomicalOrAcquiredBodyStructureCode
title: Anatomical Or Acquired Body Structure Code
description:
This subset contains concepts that represent body structures including anatomical structures and acquired body structures.

This is a broad data exchange subset that is intended to support semantic interoperability and conformance testing. It is recommended that jurisdictions define and implement more specific clinically curated subsets that contain a portion of these concepts for data capture at the point of care for their specific use case.

This subset was defined using the intensional definition of <442083009\|Anatomical or acquired body structure (body structure)\| against the substrate SNOMED CT Canadian Edition.

This resource is an informative value set; a normative subset containing the expanded values can be found on Canada Health Infoway's [Terminology Server](https://terminologystandardsservice.ca/fhir). The [direct link](https://fhir.infoway-inforoute.ca/ValueSet/anatomicaloracquiredbodystructurecode) to the ValueSet on the Terminology Server will require an [InfoCentral account](https://infocentral.infoway-inforoute.ca/en/register) for access.
